---

## 🚀 DEPLOY IN 2 MINUTES

### **Copy & Paste This Command**

```powershell
cd "C:\Users\USER\source\repos\Buy&Sell"; git add .github/; git commit -m "ci: add GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline"; git push origin master
```

### **What This Does**
1. Navigates to your repository
2. Stages all .github/ files
3. Creates commit with description
4. Pushes to GitHub
5. **Triggers your first CI/CD run!** 🎯

---

## 📊 WHAT HAPPENS AUTOMATICALLY

### **After You Push**

```
⏱️ 0-1 min    : Setup (.NET, packages)
⏱️ 1-3 min    : Build & database setup
⏱️ 3-4 min    : Run 87 tests ✅
⏱️ 4-6 min    : Docker build 🐳
⏱️ 6-7 min    : Done! Results available 📊
```

### **You Get**
- ✅ All 87 tests executed
- ✅ Coverage report generated
- ✅ Docker image built
- ✅ Results stored in artifacts
- ✅ Status visible on GitHub
